subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-05-23
subcodes.first_line: The real enjoyment of the world of humanity consists in the fact that every individual may think of the well-being of others... During the lifetime of Muhammad one day his son-in-law, Ali, his wife and two sons kept fast.
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @stories; anecdotes, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
